bugs.title: Generated textures are high-res (340-858 KB each, not 16x16) -- Minecraft will rescale them which may produce blurry/non-pixel-art appearance
bugs.evidence: club.png is 492.9 KB and rapier.png is 529.5 KB -- visual inspection confirms high-resolution output (estimated 768x768 or 1024x1024). The pre-existing longsword.png is 0.1 KB, consistent with a true 16x16 pixel-art sprite. All 33 gemini-generated textures range from 340 KB (sling.png) to 858 KB (javelin.png), clearly not 16x16.
bugs.expected: Files should be valid 16x16 pixel PNG images per acceptance criterion; a true 16x16 RGBA PNG would be under 1 KB
bugs.suggested_fix: Post-process gemini outputs with PIL/Pillow or ImageMagick to downscale to 16x16 with nearest-neighbor filtering (e.g. `convert input.png -filter point -resize 16x16 output.png`). Alternatively replace with handcrafted 16x16 pixel art in a future iteration.
